title: Author a modal component with named slots
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/components/modal.ex (module MyAppWeb.Components.Modal). Define modal/1 with attrs :id (string, required), :show (boolean, default false), :on_cancel (any, default nil). Declare slot :title, slot :actions, and slot :inner_block (required). Render

{render_slot(@title)}

{render_slot(@inner_block)}
{render_slot(@actions)}
.
tier_rationale: Multi-slot component with three distinct named slots + default inner_block + required markers. Standard pattern with 4 pieces.
